faq.question: How do I create a restaurant website without coding skills?
faq.answer: Promto uses AI — you describe the restaurant, and the system automatically generates a website with menu, booking, and design.

faq.question: Can I add online ordering or table reservations?
faq.answer: Yes, the website has ready booking and order forms — guests can select date, time, and party size.

faq.question: Will there be a menu with prices and dish photos?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a full online menu with descriptions, prices, and photos for each dish.

faq.question: Will the website appear in Google and Yandex?
faq.answer: Yes, all websites are SEO-optimized — the restaurant will rank for relevant queries in your city.

faq.question: How long does it take to create a website?
faq.answer: AI generates the website in seconds. A complete website with content will be ready in 5–10 minutes.

faq.question: Can I connect my own domain?
faq.answer: Yes, paid plans allow connecting any domain to your website.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will do everything — from design to menu content.
cta_final_subtitle: Full-featured website with menu and booking — in 5 minutes without coders.
